title: Origin Realms - Legendary Tooltips DLC
description: Not enough tooltip borders in Gous's Resource Pack? Have some more!
body:
![Preview of some altered Tooltip Border Frames, such as for Nether items, Blighted Badlands, and others.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/909fa0cfb981452231d534a3f54d5a068ef2e4de.png)

![Description regarding the purpose of this Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97477f903883d77868527acda6977a22b3ec3a6d.png)
<details>I love Gous's Legendary Tooltip Resource Pack for Origin Realms, as it adds extra immersion to a Vanilla Expanded Server. However, not all items, blocks, etc. have unique tooltips given to them when they should. This Resource Pack adds in extra tooltip borders to blocks and items such as The Nether, The Blighted Badlands, and more! I will continue to support and expand to this Resource Pack until I am fully satisfied with it. Please note this is NOT a REPLACEMENT of Gous's Resource Pack and instead an Addition.</details>

![Requirements for the Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23371b51e314bd95418e79d936075c153ddd8db7.png)
<details>Gous's OR - Legendary Tooltip Resource Pack and Grend's Legendary Tooltips Mod are both required in order for this resource pack to function and be the best it can be!</details>
